title: Chewy Ukrainian Poaching Dates with Dark Chocolate Chips
description: This dish combines the chewiness of dates with a salty twist for a unique date-night treat that's gluten-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons dark chocolate chips
ingredients.notes: Minimally sweetened for a savory touch.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup water or non-dairy milk (optional)
ingredients.notes: Use 10% of the total liquid capacity to prevent scalding.

ingredients.name: Juice of half a lemon, optional for garnish
1/4 cup gluten-free all-purpose flour or 1 tablespoon cornstarch (for thickening)
ingredients.notes: Optional to ensure the dish is gluten-free.

instructions: Place pitted dates in a heatproof bowl and drizzle with dark chocolate chips. Drizzle with water or non-dairy milk if needed.
Bake in the preheated oven for about 20-25 minutes until the dates are soft but not completely melted.
Remove from the oven, let cool slightly, then crush lightly to create chewy pieces.
If using gluten-free flour/cornstarch, mix it with water or non-dairy milk in a small bowl to thicken the mixture before adding to the crushed dates.
Combine the thickened liquid and date-chocolate mixture. Mix well until smooth and creamy.
Pour into an oven-safe dish and let it cool slightly before serving. You can garnish with lemon juice for extra brightness.
